title: Om Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Om Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!
